description.zh: 色彩 / Look-dev 工作台(规划中)· 目标:管理 colorgrade.toml + theme.json + 后处理栈(palette / LUT / 后处理)统一全局色调。当前为 marketplace 占位,面板实现待后续 sprint 落地。
description.en: Color & look-dev workbench (planned) — will manage colorgrade.toml + theme.json + a postprocess stack (palette / LUT / postprocess) for global color grading. Currently a marketplace placeholder; the panel lands in a later sprint.
